title: NANA Elders’ Settlement Trust Announces 2020 Distribution
summary: The trustees of the NANA Elders’ Settlement Trust – or NEST – voted to issue a dividend of $1,500 per Elder for 2020. The dividend will be paid on or around Feb. 10, 2021. Elders who are NANA shareholders and 65 or older as of Dec. 31, 2020, will receive the dividend. Those who have elected to recei...
